meaning: adj.修过脸的,刮过脸的,削发的 vbl.shave的过去分词
examples: His shaven head accentuates his large round face.
To keep cool people had their hair cut with shaven heads.
His beard straggles because he hasn't shaven for a week.
He is comfortably sized, barely cresting the five-foot barrier, shaven of head and broad of smile.
He was a stranger, a clean-shaven, middle-aged man, with a nose too small for his face.
